tests.test_name: Annotation Summary renders and JSON is complete for QA Manager
tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager can upload a BDD test file, trigger analysis with the Annotation Summary add-on, and receive a complete output — both on screen and as a downloadable JSON — that includes a fully populated Annotation Health section without any missing or unresolved values.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation and analysis appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The analysis result is visible to the user after processing

test_coverage.verification_step: "Annotation Health" appears exactly once in the output content
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The Annotation Health section is present without duplication in the on-screen output

test_coverage.verification_step: The downloaded JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the exported JSON are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data

test_coverage.verification_step: The JSON has a top-level key "annotation_summary"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The exported JSON is structured correctly with the expected root section
The Annotation Health data is present and contains content in the JSON export
The JSON structure is clean with no duplicate keys or sections
